title: 35-Year Supercross Damian Fulton Signed Print — 27 of 35
source_title: 35 Year Supercross Damian Fulton Signed Print — Damian Fulton & Bill Ryan 27/35
creator_display: Damian X. Fulton; Supercross BMX / Bill Ryan association
alt: Color Radical Rick Supercross anniversary print showing two BMX racers and a dense collage of BMX imagery.
summary: This 35-Year Anniversary Supercross BMX print was created by Radical Rick artist Damian Fulton to celebrate the legacy of Supercross BMX, founded by Bill Ryan. The print is signed by Damian Fulton, connecting BMX racing history with the artwork and visual culture that helped shape the sport. Pieces like this highlight the collaboration between BMX innovators and artists who documented and celebrated the sport’s evolution.
provenance: Source recorded as Damian Fulton in the Lititz BMX inventory.
claims: The exact signatures visible on the physical print should be verified directly before expanding the signature statement beyond the supplied title.
details: Created as a Supercross BMX anniversary print.
Source title associates Damian Fulton and Bill Ryan.
rights_statement: Artifact images and Lititz BMX descriptive content remain associated with their respective creators, owners and Lititz BMX. Published for historical, educational and preservation access.
